author: Matthew Chin
title: Do you need a chief AI officer? Here's how the tech is changing boardrooms
description: AI may now be coming for the C-suite, according to a report published Monday by IBM, which found that most companies were now staffing chief AI officer roles.
content:
Since the debut of OpenAI's ChatGPT in 2022, and the subsequent AI revolution, workers across industries have been hit by sweeping layoffs.

title: Cerebras to raise IPO price range to $150-$160 a share: Reuters​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
description: Cerebras is considering an IPO price range of $150 to $160 a share and raising the number of shares marketed to 30 million from 28 million, Reuters reported.
